skills.name: atlas-overview
skills.description: Plain-text overview of Atlas: capabilities, supported databases and LLM providers, security model, deploy options, and quick links into the docs and SDKs.

skills.name: atlas-mcp-server
skills.description: MCP server card for Atlas — connect an MCP-compatible client to your data warehouse via Atlas's validated text-to-SQL agent.

skills.name: atlas-api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 API catalog pointing to the OpenAPI spec, hosted documentation, and the public health endpoint for the Atlas API.
